results.reason: Hot-refresh behavior is covered by focused backend/frontend tests and verified through live API transitions: install, disable, re-enable, and uninstall all update provider definitions immediately without restarting services.
evidence: Code path evidence: app/components/flow/canvas.tsx calls refreshNodeProviderDefinitions() on mount and bumps definitionsVersion for AddNodeMenu

API trace: evidence/external-cross-remaining-g4/hot-refresh-api-trace.json shows list_node_provider_definitions transitions: present after install -> empty after disable -> present after re-enable -> empty after uninstall

results.reason: A saved flow containing a plugin node remained loadable after uninstall (no editor crash), UI emitted unknown-type fallback warnings, and execution produced a clear runtime error identifying the unresolved node type.
evidence: API trace: evidence/external-cross-remaining-g4/api-trace.json (create agent with utv_ext_g4_echo:echo node, uninstall plugin, get_agent still returns unresolved node type in graph_data)
Browser console warnings (agent-browser console): React Flow 'Node type "utv_ext_g4_echo:echo" not found. Using fallback type "default"'

Backend execution error evidence: evidence/external-cross-remaining-g4/stream-agent-after-uninstall.sse.txt contains RunError with 'Flow contains unknown node type(s) with no registered executor: utv_ext_g4_echo:echo... Reinstall/enable... or remove those nodes.'
pytest: tests/test_unknown_node_handling.py PASSED (clear unknown-node error behavior validated in run_flow and streamed chat runtime)

commands.command: python3 deterministic API validation for VAL-CROSS-011 (import plugin from /tmp/utv_ext_g4_plugin, create/save flow, uninstall plugin, get_agent, stream_flow_run)
python3 streamed chat execution after uninstall via /channel/stream_agent_chat
commands.observation: Captured RunError unknown-node message in stream-agent-after-uninstall.sse.txt

commands.observation: Captured unresolved-node UI artifact and console fallback warnings

interactiveChecks.check: Open unresolved-flow editor page after plugin uninstall
Console/errors review for unresolved plugin node UI state
interactiveChecks.evidence: agent-browser errors: none; agent-browser console shows repeated fallback warnings for missing node type utv_ext_g4_echo:echo
stream-agent-after-uninstall.sse.txt includes RunError with explicit unresolved node-type guidance

frictions.description: Assigned account/password were not needed because this surface did not require an auth/login interaction for the tested flows.
frictions.resolution: Executed assertions directly via assigned namespace through backend commands and agent editor URL.

frictions.description: Backend health endpoint at /health on port 8000 returned 404 while /command and /channel endpoints were healthy.
frictions.resolution: Used command/channel endpoints for deterministic validation evidence.

frictions.description: Direct /channel/stream_flow_run call after uninstall returned RunStarted/RunCompleted without surfacing the unknown-node error in this setup.
frictions.resolution: Used /channel/stream_agent_chat against the same saved flow, which emitted the expected clear RunError for unresolved node type.
